description: A directory for MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers, clients, apps, and use cases.

required_fields.name: URL
required_fields.description: Can be a GitHub repository URL, a subfolder of a repository, or a standalone website URL

required_fields.name: URL
required_fields.description: Can be a GitHub repository URL, a subfolder of a repository, or a standalone website URL

alternative_submission_method.description: PulseMCP ingests entries from the Official MCP Registry daily and processes them weekly
alternative_submission_method.note: If it has been a week since publishing in the Official MCP Registry, or to make adjustments to a listing, email contact is available

important_notes: Use case submissions are no longer being accepted (as of research date)
There is an API available for programmatic access
The site also features 'MCP Apps' and 'Posts' sections
Discord community is available for discussions
submission_guidelines.contact_email: contact email available on the site
